    ACCOUNT_NOT_CONFIRMED - Enum constant in enum class net.sylphian.verify.paper.api.model.VerificationReason
    The forum account is linked but hasn't been email-confirmed yet.
    ACCOUNT_NOT_CONFIRMED - Enum constant in enum class net.sylphian.verify.velocity.api.model.VerificationReason
    The forum account is linked but not confirmed (e.g., email not verified).
    addStrike(UUID) - Method in class net.sylphian.verify.paper.manager.VerifyManager
    Records a 'strike' (technical failure) for a player and checks if the limit is reached.
    addStrike(UUID) - Method in class net.sylphian.verify.velocity.manager.VerifyManager
    Adds a strike (technical failure) for a player and returns if the max limit was reached.

    API_ERROR - Enum constant in enum class net.sylphian.verify.paper.api.model.VerificationReason
    A technical error occurred while communicating with the API.
    API_ERROR - Enum constant in enum class net.sylphian.verify.velocity.api.model.VerificationReason
    An internal technical error occurred while contacting the verification API.
    API_FAILURE_NO_MESSAGE - Enum constant in enum class net.sylphian.verify.paper.api.model.VerificationReason
    API call returned a failure status but provided no specific error message.
    API_FAILURE_NO_MESSAGE - Enum constant in enum class net.sylphian.verify.velocity.api.model.VerificationReason
    The API reported a failure but provided no specific error message.
    API_SUCCESS_NO_DATA - Enum constant in enum class net.sylphian.verify.paper.api.model.VerificationReason
    API call returned 200 OK but the data payload was missing.
    API_SUCCESS_NO_DATA - Enum constant in enum class net.sylphian.verify.velocity.api.model.VerificationReason
    The API returned success but without the expected player data.

    Represents a standard API response envelope from the XenForo/Sylphian API.

    Standard API response envelope used across the Sylphian network.

    Checks if this fish can be caught at the given Y coordinate.

    Applies all configured catch effects for the given catch.

    Applies the mutation to the caught fish item.

    Calculates and applies a custom bite delay to the given fishing hook.

    Applies all registered nametag teams to a newly created scoreboard.
    asSelected(ItemStack) - Static method in class net.sylphian.minecraft.crates.gui.RewardSelectionGUI
    Returns a copy of the given item with a green ✔ prefix on its display name to indicate it has been selected by the player.

    Too many failed attempts detected; the account is temporarily blocked.

    byDescendingRarity() - Static method in class net.sylphian.minecraft.fishing.fish.Rarity
    Gets all registered rarities sorted by their catch chance in descending order (from rarest/smallest chance to most common/largest chance).
